_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: including Spi1 and Etv4, which we validated by immunohistochemical assays in murine and human NF1-associated PNF respectively
details: Successfully validated increased expression of Etv4 by immunohistochemical assays in human NF1-associated PNF
